member_descriptions: beige striped bed with wood headboard
member_long_descriptions: Bed with a beige-and-gray horizontally striped duvet and two matching rectangular pillows set against a dark polished wooden paneled headboard; linens are neatly made with faint creases and the pillows are slightly askew at the head — object occupies the foreground and appears approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Bed with a beige-and-gray horizontally striped duvet and two matching rectangular pillows set against a dark polished wooden paneled headboard; linens are neatly made with faint creases and the pillows are slightly askew at the head — object occupies the foreground and appears approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.

member_descriptions: dark wooden nightstand, three drawers
member_long_descriptions: Dark stained wooden nightstand with three stacked drawers and metal pull handles, rectangular glossy top with small objects visible, carved base molding and curved side detail; mostly full-frontal view with slight shadowing — estimated distance from camera ~1.0 m.
clusters.representative_description: Dark stained wooden nightstand with three stacked drawers and metal pull handles, rectangular glossy top with small objects visible, carved base molding and curved side detail; mostly full-frontal view with slight shadowing — estimated distance from camera ~1.0 m.

member_descriptions: beige pleated shade table lamp
member_long_descriptions: Beige/cream pleated fabric shade lamp with dark vertical ribs and a turned dark wood or bronze base, illuminated and slightly edge-cropped on the left; appears to sit on a bedside surface about 0.8 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Beige/cream pleated fabric shade lamp with dark vertical ribs and a turned dark wood or bronze base, illuminated and slightly edge-cropped on the left; appears to sit on a bedside surface about 0.8 m from the camera.

member_descriptions: edge-cropped dark wooden nightstand
member_long_descriptions: Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown wooden nightstand with a single visible drawer and a small round metal knob, varnished rectangular top holding a few objects and partially occluded by the bed in the foreground; appears about 0.6 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark reddish-brown wooden nightstand with a single visible drawer and a small round metal knob, varnished rectangular top holding a few objects and partially occluded by the bed in the foreground; appears about 0.6 m from the camera.

member_descriptions: rectangular striped off-white pillow, edge
member_long_descriptions: Rectangular pillow with horizontal gray-blue and light gray stripes on an off-white woven fabric, slightly flattened and soft-looking, filling the crop and partially edge-cropped at the top-right; appears close to the camera (≈0.5 m).
clusters.representative_description: Rectangular pillow with horizontal gray-blue and light gray stripes on an off-white woven fabric, slightly flattened and soft-looking, filling the crop and partially edge-cropped at the top-right; appears close to the camera (≈0.5 m).

member_descriptions: beige pleated shade table lamp
member_long_descriptions: Warm-lit table lamp with a cream-beige pleated fabric shade featuring dark vertical trim, a curving dark wood or bronze stem with a glossy white glass decorative midsection and a carved dark base; lamp appears upright on a surface and is approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Warm-lit table lamp with a cream-beige pleated fabric shade featuring dark vertical trim, a curving dark wood or bronze stem with a glossy white glass decorative midsection and a carved dark base; lamp appears upright on a surface and is approximately 0.8 m from the camera.

member_descriptions: rectangular beige striped pillow
member_long_descriptions: Mostly visible rectangular beige/cream fabric pillow with horizontal thin gray-blue stripes, smooth cotton-like texture and light surface folds; pillow appears plump and slightly edge-cropped on the left side, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Mostly visible rectangular beige/cream fabric pillow with horizontal thin gray-blue stripes, smooth cotton-like texture and light surface folds; pillow appears plump and slightly edge-cropped on the left side, approximately 0.6 m from the camera.

member_descriptions: dark mahogany dresser top, partial
member_long_descriptions: Partial/edge-cropped dark mahogany wooden dresser showing a glossy rectangular top with visible wood grain and minor surface wear, and two lower drawer fronts with round dark knobs visible; appears close to the camera (approximately 1.0 m).
clusters.representative_description: Partial/edge-cropped dark mahogany wooden dresser showing a glossy rectangular top with visible wood grain and minor surface wear, and two lower drawer fronts with round dark knobs visible; appears close to the camera (approximately 1.0 m).

member_descriptions: beige-gray striped duvet bed edge
member_long_descriptions: Partial crop of a bed corner showing a beige-gray striped duvet cover with thin darker stripes and light wrinkles draped over the mattress and a visible dark wooden frame; the bed is cut off by the image edge and appears about 0.7 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Partial crop of a bed corner showing a beige-gray striped duvet cover with thin darker stripes and light wrinkles draped over the mattress and a visible dark wooden frame; the bed is cut off by the image edge and appears about 0.7 m from the camera.

member_descriptions: black flat-screen TV edge-cropped
member_long_descriptions: Dark glossy black flat-screen TV with a reflective, turned-off display showing dim room reflections and small indicator lights; large rectangular panel is partially edge-cropped and appears mounted or very close to a wall, approximately 1.5 m from the camera.
clusters.representative_description: Dark glossy black flat-screen TV with a reflective, turned-off display showing dim room reflections and small indicator lights; large rectangular panel is partially edge-cropped and appears mounted or very close to a wall, approximately 1.5 m from the camera.
